groundstation.dataflowendpointgroup.secu.Docs: The ARN of a role which Ground Station has permission to assume, such as `arn:aws:iam::1234567890:role/DataDeliveryServiceRole`.    Ground Station will assume this role and create an ENI in your VPC on the specified subnet upon creation of a dataflow endpoint group. This ENI is used as the ingress/egress point for data streamed during a satellite contact.
The security group Ids of the security role, such as `sg-1234567890abcdef0`.
The subnet Ids of the security details, such as `subnet-12345678`.
